---
name: Data correction
about: Report a wrong or broken record mapping (URL, date range, county, certificate number)
title: "[Data] "
labels: data-correction
---

**Series and record number**
e.g. SE43-1037, CM1132-94

**What's wrong**
Describe what's incorrect. Examples: the URL is broken or points to
the wrong file, a date range is off, a county is missing or listed
under the wrong month, a certificate number resolves to the wrong
record.

**Expected result**
What should this actually resolve to, if you know? A corrected URL,
date range, or certificate range is the most useful thing you can
include here.

**Source for the correction**
Where did you confirm this? A link to the correct item on
[archive.org](https://archive.org/), the
[MSA guide](https://guide.msa.maryland.gov/), or another primary
source is ideal. If you're not sure of the correct answer and are just
flagging that something looks wrong, that's fine too - say so.

**Anything else**
Optional - any other context that might help track this down.
